content:

{
  "sentences": [
    {
      "text": "我妹妹想當老師，所以她現在在學校實習。",
      "pinyin": "Wǒ mèimei xiǎng dāng lǎoshī, suǒyǐ tā xiànzài zài xuéxiào shíxí.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 mei4mei xiang3 dang1 lao3shi1, suo3yi3 ta1 xian4zai4 zai4 xue2xiao4 shi2xi2.",
      "translation_en": "My younger sister wants to be a teacher, so she is currently interning at a school.",
      "translation_ko": "제 여동생은 선생님이 되고 싶어서, 지금 학교에서 인턴십을 하고 있어요."
    },
    {
      "text": "他當老闆以後，每天都加班到很晚。",
      "pinyin": "Tā dāng lǎobǎn yǐhòu, měitiān dōu jiābān dào hěn wǎn.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 dang1 lao3ban3 yi3hou4, mei3tian1 dou1 jia1ban1 dao4 hen3 wan3.",
      "translation_en": "After he became the boss, he works overtime until very late every day.",
      "translation_ko": "그가 사장이 된 후로 매일 늦게까지 야근을 해요."
    },
    {
      "title": "你以前當過學生會長嗎？",
      "text": "Nǐ yǐqián dāng guò xuéshēng huì zhǎng ma?",
      "pinyin": "Ni3 yi3qian2 dang1 guo4 xue2sheng1 hui4 zhang3 ma0?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 yi3qian2 dang1 guo4 xue2sheng1 hui4 zhang3 ma0?",
      "translation_en": "Have you ever been the student council president before?",
      "translation_ko": "예전에 학생회장을 해본 적이 있나요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "這個學期我當助教，要幫教授改作業。",
      "pinyin": "Zhège xuéqī wǒ dāng zhùjiào, yào bāng jiàoshòu gǎi zuòyè.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "zhe4ge5 xue2qi1 wo3 dang1 zhu4jiao4, yao4 bang1 jiao4shou4 gai3 zuo4ye4.",
      "translation_en": "This semester I am a teaching assistant and need to help the professor grade homework.",
      "translation_ko": "이번 학기에 저는 조교가 되어 교수님의 숙제 채점을 도와드려요."
    },
    {
      "text": "他不想當全職員工，因為他還在讀大學。",
      "pinyin": "Tā bù xiǎng dāng quánzhí yuángōng, yīnwèi tā hái zài dú dàxué.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 bu4 xiang3 dang1 quan2zhi2 yuan2gong1, yin1wei4 ta1 hai2 zai4 du2 da4xue2.",
      "translation_en": "He doesn't want to be a full-time employee because he is still in college.",
      "translation_ko": "그는 아직 대학에 다니고 있어서 정규직이 되고 싶지 않아요."
    },
    {
      "text": "我哥哥當工程師，他每天都要開會。",
      "pinyin": "Wǒ gēge dāng gōngchéngshī, tā měitiān dōu yào kāihuì.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 ge1ge5 dang1 gong1cheng2shi1, ta1 mei3tian1 dou1 yao4 kai1hui4.",
      "translation_en": "My older brother is an engineer; he has meetings every day.",
      "translation_ko": "제 오빠는 엔지니어인데, 매일 회의를 해요."
    },
    {
      "text": "你打算畢業以後當什麼？",
      "pinyin": "Nǐ dǎsuàn bìyè yǐhòu dāng shénme?",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 da3suan4 bi4ye4 yi3hou4 dang1 shen2me5?",
      "translation_en": "What do you plan to be after graduation?",
      "translation_ko": "졸업 후에 무엇이 될 계획인가요?"
    },
    {
      "text": "她當兼職工讀生，所以時間比較彈性。",
      "pinyin": "Tā dāng jiānzhí gōngdúshēng, suǒyǐ shíjiān bǐjiào tánxìng.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 dang1 jian1zhi2 gong1du2sheng1, suo3yi3 shi2jian1 bi3jiao4 tan2xing4.",
      "translation_en": "She works as a part-time student worker, so her schedule is more flexible.",
      "translation_ko": "그녀는 아르바이트를 하기 때문에 시간이 더 유연해요."
    },
    {
      "text": "我們部門的老闆以前當過業務經理。",
      "pinyin": "Wǒmen bùmén de lǎobǎn yǐqián dāng guò yèwù jīnglǐ.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "wo3men5 bu4men2 de5 lao3ban3 yi3qian2 dang1 guo4 ye4wu4 jing1li3.",
      "translation_en": "The boss of our department used to be a sales manager.",
      "translation_ko": "우리 부서의 사장님은 예전에 영업 관리자였어요."
    },
    {
      "text": "他當同學的助教，幫大家複習考試。",
      "pinyin": "Tā dāng tóngxué de zhùjiào, bāng dàjiā fùxí kǎoshì.",
      "pinyin_numeric": "ta1 dang1 tong2xue2 de5 zhu4jiao4, bang1 da4jia1 fu4xi2 kao3shi4.",

      "translation_ko": "그는 동료 학생들의 조교가 되어 모두가 시험을 복습할 수 있도록 도와줘요."
    }
  ]
